steps.title: Use the missing input
steps.content:
The missing value $a$ is the $y$ value when $x=3$. Substitute $x=3$ into the given equation.
$$y=4(2)^3+3$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph $y=4\cdot2^x+3$ and evaluate it at $x=3$. The point $(3,35)$ is on the graph. The answer is B.
